reference: Hello, yes, he will require a renal biopsy provided there is recent worsening of kidney function or for confirmation of the diagnosis of multiple myeloma, as sometimes not all blood parameters are conclusive for diagnosis. A kidney biopsy is a safe procedure, and it gives definite insight into the kidney problem, which helps the doctor to manage the disease process better.
text: Hello. Yes, you will require a renal biopsy provided there is recent worsening of kidney function or the confirmation of the diagnosis of multiple myeloma, and sometimes not all bloodsuits are conclusive for diagnosis. A kidney biopsy is a safe test and it gives definite insight into the kidney problem, which helps the doctor to manage the disease process better.
